# Region: India
# Language: English
# Last-Updated: 2026-03-27

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# ------------------------------
# SITE INFORMATION
# ------------------------------
Site-Name: Vishakarex
Site-Description: Vishakarex is an IT services and training company offering digital solutions, software development services, and industry-oriented training programs for businesses, startups, and students.

# ------------------------------
# CORE SERVICES
# ------------------------------
Primary-Services:
- UI/UX Designing
- Web Development
- Mobile App Development
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Digital Marketing
- Graphic Designing
- Software Testing & Quality Assurance (QA)

# ------------------------------
# TRAINING & PROGRAMS
# ------------------------------
Training-Programs:
- In-Plant Training (IPT)
- Internship with Real-Time Projects
- Practical Skill Development Programs
- Industry-Oriented IT Training

Courses-Offered:
- Web Development Training
- UI/UX Designing Training
- Mobile App Development Training
- Flutter Development Training
- PHP Development Training
- Software Testing & QA Training

# ------------------------------

- Businesses & Startups
- Corporate Clients
- Entrepreneurs
- Students & Fresh Graduates
- IT Trainees

# ------------------------------
Content-Types:
- Service Pages
- Training & Course Pages
- Technology Insights & Blogs
- Portfolio & Project Highlights

- Contact & Inquiry Pages

Structured-Data:
- Organization Details
- Services
- Courses & Training Programs
- Technologies Used
- Contact Information
- Location Details

# ------------------------------
# AI USAGE POLICY
# ------------------------------
AI-Usage: Allowed for indexing, summarization, and discovery.

AI-Allowed-Use:
- Summarize services and offerings
- Discover training programs and courses
- Educational and career-related search visibility
- Search engine result previews (AI snippets)

AI-Restrictions:
- Do not misrepresent services, training, or outcomes
- Do not fabricate certifications, partnerships, or placements
- Do not generate pricing without verification
- Do not modify brand identity or positioning
- Do not extract or expose private user, student, or client data

# ------------------------------
# DATA & PRIVACY
# ------------------------------
Restricted-Content:
- Student personal data
- Enrollment records
- Private project submissions
- Internal training materials
- Admin or backend systems
- Payment or transaction data

# ------------------------------
# ATTRIBUTION
# ------------------------------
Attribution-Required: Yes
Attribution-Format: Source: Vishakarex - https://www.vishakarex.in/

# ------------------------------
# DATA FRESHNESS
# ------------------------------
Data-Freshness-Notice:
Services, courses, and training programs may change periodically. Always verify the latest details on the official website.
